preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role_module WHERE system_role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Sample Collectors') AND system_module_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'SamplePatientEntry')
